title: Telehealth
subtitle: Online therapy via video for adults in Virginia.

items.label: Flexibility
items.text: No commute, schedule around other commitments like kids or work.

items.label: Sense of Safety
items.text: For some, virtual sessions are less intense or intimidating.

items.label: Privacy
items.text: Avoid being seen parking or sitting in a waiting room.

items.label: Continuity of Care
items.text: No need to miss sessions due to weather or mild illness.

items.label: Access
items.text: Especially helpful for those in rural areas.

steps.label: Consultation
steps.text: Discuss what you need and how I can help.

steps.label: Reminders
steps.text: Receive email reminders before your session.

steps.label: Log on
steps.text: Click the secure link in your email to join the session.

bottom_text: Telehealth is proven effective and offers a convenient way to prioritize your mental health from the comfort of your own space.
